commands.name: cloud
serve

options.name: --api-key
options.description: Runner API key. Env: CODEXWEBUI_RUNNER_API_KEY

options.name: --heartbeat-interval
options.description:
Heartbeat interval. Examples: 5s, 250ms, 00:00:05.
Env: CODEXWEBUI_RUNNER_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL

options.name: --identity-file
options.description:
Identity file path. Env:
CODEXWEBUI_RUNNER_IDENTITY_FILE

options.name: --json
options.description: Deprecated. Use --outputformat json/jsonl.

options.name: --name
options.description:
Runner display name. Env: CODEXWEBUI_RUNNER_NAME
(default: hostname)

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Output format: human, json, or jsonl. Default:
human. For long-running commands, 'json' behaves like
'jsonl'.

options.name: --server-url
options.description:
CodexWebUi.Api base URL. Env:
CODEXWEBUI_RUNNER_SERVER_URL

options.name: --workspace-root
options.description:
Allowed workspace root (repeatable). Env:
CODEXWEBUI_RUNNER_WORKSPACE_ROOTS (semicolon-separated)

commands.description:
Run the Cloud runner (connects to CodexWebUi.Api via 
SignalR).
Runner that connects to CodexWebUi.Api via SignalR.

commands.name: exec

options.name: --cd
options.description:
Working directory (exact-match filtering for
ls/--last). Default: current directory

options.name: --detach
options.description:
Detach after creating the run (does not stream
output).

options.name: --json
options.description:
Deprecated. Use --outputformat json/jsonl. For
streaming commands this outputs JSONL events (client-side envelope).

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Output format: human, json, or jsonl. Default: human.
For streaming commands, 'json' behaves like 'jsonl'.

options.name: --prompt
options.description:
Prompt text (alternative to positional PROMPT). Use
'-' to read stdin.

options.name: --reasoning
options.description:
Reasoning effort override (e.g. none, minimal, low,
medium, high, xhigh).

options.name: --token
options.description:
Bearer token. Default: env
CODEX_D_TOKEN/CODEX_RUNNER_TOKEN

options.name: --url
options.description:
Runner base URL. Default: env
CODEX_D_URL/CODEX_RUNNER_URL or daemon-first discovery.

commands.description: Start a new run via HTTP (optionally detached).

commands.name: review

options.name: --approval-policy
options.description:
Runner approval policy (generally keep this as
'never' for non-interactive review runs).

options.name: --arg
options.description:
Additional raw args forwarded to `codex
review` (repeatable).

options.name: --base
options.description: Review changes against base branch.

options.name: --cd
options.description:
Working directory (exact-match filtering for
ls/--last). Default: current directory

options.name: --commit
options.description: Review a specific commit SHA.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Forward a `--config <key=value>`
option to `codex review` (repeatable).

options.name: --delivery
options.description:
App-server review delivery: 'inline' or
'detached' (only when --mode appserver).

options.name: --detach
options.description:
Detach after creating the review run (does not stream
output).

options.name: --disable
options.description:
Forward a `--disable <feature>`
option to `codex review` (repeatable).

options.name: --enable
options.description:
Forward an `--enable <feature>`
option to `codex review` (repeatable).

options.name: --json
options.description:
Deprecated. Use --outputformat json/jsonl. For
streaming commands this outputs JSONL events (client-side envelope).

options.name: --mode
options.description:
Review execution mode: 'exec' (codex review)
or 'appserver' (codex app-server review/start).

options.name: --model
options.description:
Model the review should use (forwarded to `codex
review`).

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Output format: human, json, or jsonl. Default: human.
For streaming commands, 'json' behaves like 'jsonl'.

options.name: --prompt
options.description:
Optional review prompt. In exec-mode this becomes a
custom review target (mutually exclusive with --base/--commit/--uncommitted). In
appserver-mode it becomes developer instructions (can be combined with scope).
Use '-' to read stdin.

options.name: --reasoning
options.description:
Reasoning effort override. Examples: none, minimal,
low, medium, high, xhigh.

options.name: --sandbox
options.description:
Sandbox mode (primarily affects app-server mode).
Examples: read-only, workspace-write, danger-full-access.

options.name: --title
options.description: Optional review title.

options.name: --token
options.description:
Bearer token. Default: env
CODEX_D_TOKEN/CODEX_RUNNER_TOKEN

options.name: --uncommitted
options.description: Review staged/unstaged/untracked changes.

options.name: --url
options.description:
Runner base URL. Default: env
CODEX_D_URL/CODEX_RUNNER_URL or daemon-first discovery.

arguments.name: PROMPT
arguments.description:
Optional review prompt. In exec-mode this becomes a 
custom review target (mutually exclusive with --base/--commit/--uncommitted). In
appserver-mode it becomes developer instructions (can be combined with scope). 
Use '-' to read stdin.

commands.description:
Run a non-interactive `codex review` on the 
runner and stream output.

commands.name: attach

options.name: --cd
options.description:
Working directory (exact-match filtering for
ls/--last). Default: current directory

options.name: --follow-only
options.description: Do not replay history; only stream new events.

options.name: --json
options.description:
Deprecated. Use --outputformat json/jsonl. For
streaming commands this outputs JSONL events (client-side envelope).

options.name: --last
options.description:
Attach to the most recent run for the current
--cd/cwd.

options.name: --no-follow
options.description:
Replay (or tail) and then exit even if the run is
still running.

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Output format: human, json, or jsonl. Default:
human. For streaming commands, 'json' behaves like
'jsonl'.

options.name: --tail
options.description: Replay only the last N events, then follow.

options.name: --token
options.description:
Bearer token. Default: env
CODEX_D_TOKEN/CODEX_RUNNER_TOKEN

options.name: --url
options.description:
Runner base URL. Default: env
CODEX_D_URL/CODEX_RUNNER_URL or daemon-first discovery.

commands.description: Attach to an existing run and stream SSE output.

options.name: --cd
options.description:
Working directory (exact-match filtering for
ls/--last). Default: current directory

options.name: --json
options.description:
Deprecated. Use --outputformat json/jsonl. For
streaming commands this outputs JSONL events (client-side envelope).

options.name: --last
options.description:
Interrupt the most recent run for the current
--cd/cwd.

options.name: --output-format

human. For streaming commands, 'json' behaves like

options.name: --token
options.description:
Bearer token. Default: env

options.name: --url

commands.name: messages

options.name: --cd
options.description:
Working directory (exact-match filtering for
ls/--last). Default: current directory

options.name: --count
options.description: Number of messages to print (last N).

options.name: --json
options.description:
Deprecated. Use --outputformat json/jsonl. For
streaming commands this outputs JSONL events (client-side envelope).

options.name: --last
options.description:
Use the most recent run for the current
--cd/cwd.

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Output format: human, json, or jsonl. Default:
human. For streaming commands, 'json' behaves like
'jsonl'.

options.name: --tail-events
options.description:
Only scan the last N events on the server
(performance guard). Default: 20000.

options.name: --token
options.description:
Bearer token. Default: env
CODEX_D_TOKEN/CODEX_RUNNER_TOKEN

options.name: --url
options.description:
Runner base URL. Default: env
CODEX_D_URL/CODEX_RUNNER_URL or daemon-first discovery.

commands.description: Print the last completed agent message(s) for a run.

commands.name: resume

options.name: --cd
options.description:
Working directory (exact-match filtering for
ls/--last). Default: current directory

options.name: --detach
options.description:
Detach after resuming the run (does not stream
output).

options.name: --follow-only
options.description: Do not replay history; only stream new events.

options.name: --json
options.description:
Deprecated. Use --outputformat json/jsonl. For
streaming commands this outputs JSONL events (client-side envelope).

options.name: --no-follow
options.description:
Replay (or tail) and then exit even if the run is
still running.

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Output format: human, json, or jsonl. Default:
human. For streaming commands, 'json' behaves like
'jsonl'.

options.name: --prompt
options.description:
Prompt text for the resumed turn. Default:
"continue". Use '-' to read stdin.

options.name: --reasoning
options.description:
Reasoning effort override for the resumed turn
(e.g. none, minimal, low, medium, high, xhigh).

options.name: --tail
options.description: Replay only the last N events, then follow.

options.name: --token
options.description:
Bearer token. Default: env
CODEX_D_TOKEN/CODEX_RUNNER_TOKEN

options.name: --url
options.description:
Runner base URL. Default: env
CODEX_D_URL/CODEX_RUNNER_URL or daemon-first discovery.

commands.description:
Resume a paused (or orphaned) exec run by starting a 
new turn (default prompt: "continue").

options.name: --cd

ls/--last). Default: current directory

options.name: --json
options.description:

options.name: --url

arguments.description:

'-' to read stdin.

options.description:
Working directory (exact-match filtering for
ls/--last). Default: current directory

options.name: --follow
options.description:
Keep following run events and print new thinking
summaries as they appear (human output only).

options.name: --json

Deprecated. Use --outputformat json/jsonl. For
streaming commands this outputs JSONL events (client-side envelope).

options.name: --last
options.description:
Use the most recent run for the current
--cd/cwd.

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Output format: human, json, or jsonl. Default:
human. For streaming commands, 'json' behaves like
'jsonl'.

options.name: --tail-events
options.description:
Only scan the last N events on the server
(performance guard). Default: 20000.

options.name: --token
options.description:
Bearer token. Default: env
CODEX_D_TOKEN/CODEX_RUNNER_TOKEN

options.name: --url
options.description:
Runner base URL. Default: env
CODEX_D_URL/CODEX_RUNNER_URL or daemon-first discovery.

commands.description:
Print one-line summaries from thinking blocks (bold 
**...** headings).

commands.description: List runs known by the server.
List and inspect runs known by the server.

options.name: --daemon
options.description: Run as a detached daemon (Windows only).

options.name: --daemon-child
options.description: Internal. Used by --daemon.

options.name: --daemon-version
options.description: Internal. Used by --daemon.

options.name: --force
options.description:
Daemon only. Force-stop an existing daemon and
reinstall binaries before starting.

options.name: --json
options.description: Deprecated. Use --outputformat json/jsonl.

options.name: --listen
options.description: Listen address. Default: 127.0.0.1

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Output format: human, json, or jsonl. Default: human.
For long-running commands, 'json' behaves like 'jsonl'.

options.name: --persist-raw-events
options.description:
Persist raw differential events to events.jsonl
(debugging). Default: false (in-memory backlog + Codex rollout replay).

options.name: --port
options.description:
TCP port. Foreground default: 8787. Daemon default: 0
(ephemeral).

options.name: --require-auth
options.description: Require Bearer token auth even on loopback.

options.name: --state-dir
options.description:
Override the state directory (identity + runs).
Foreground default: <cwd>/.codex-d. Daemon default:
%LOCALAPPDATA%/codex-d/daemon/config

options.name: --token
options.description:
Override the persisted token (also persists the
override).

options.name: --cd
options.description:
Working directory (exact-match filtering for
ls/--last). Default: current directory

options.name: --json
options.description:
Deprecated. Use --outputformat json/jsonl. For
streaming commands this outputs JSONL events (client-side envelope).

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Output format: human, json, or jsonl. Default: human.
For streaming commands, 'json' behaves like 'jsonl'.

options.name: --token
options.description:
Bearer token. Default: env
CODEX_D_TOKEN/CODEX_RUNNER_TOKEN

options.name: --url
options.description:
Runner base URL. Default: env
CODEX_D_URL/CODEX_RUNNER_URL or daemon-first discovery.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Print all probe attempts even when a runner is
reachable.
